candidate_check.description: OL 9 networked systems must have and implement SSH to protect the confidentiality and integrity of transmitted and received information, as well as information during preparation for transmission.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify that OL 9 networked systems implement SSH to protect the confidentiality and integrity of transmitted and received information, as well as information during preparation for transmission.

Verify that "sshd" is active with the following command:

$ systemctl is-active sshd
active

If the "sshd" service is not active, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt:
Enable the sshd service with the following command:

$ systemctl enable --now sshd
title: OL 9 networked systems must have and implement SSH to protect the confidentiality and integrity of transmitted and received information, as well as information during preparation for transmission.
